Package ru.nsu.kiryushin

Class OrderDepartment

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
public class OrderDepartment extends Object
Owns order queues and all order-related status output.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OrderDepartment(int orderQueueCapacity, int storageCapacity)
    Creates an order department for tests or standalone worker execution.
    OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig config)
    Creates an order department from the full pizzeria configuration.
    OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig config, int orderQueueCapacity, int storageCapacity)
    Creates an order department with explicit queue capacities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    acceptOrdersDuringWorkingHours()
    Accepts configured orders during working hours and closes the incoming queue afterwards.
    void
    closeOrders()
    Closes the incoming order queue.
    void
    closeStorage()
    Closes finished-order storage.
    void
    completeDelivery(List<Order> orders)
    Prints delivered statuses for the completed courier trip.
    boolean
    placeCookedOrderInStorage(Order order)
    Stores a finished order and prints storage-related statuses.
    boolean
    submitOrder(Order order)
    Adds a new incoming order and prints its accepted status.
    Order
    takeOrderForCooking()
    Returns the next order for a baker and prints its cooking status.
    List<Order>
    takeOrdersForDelivery(int bagCapacity)
    Returns orders for a courier trip and prints loading statuses.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderDepartment

      public OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig config)
      Creates an order department from the full pizzeria configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - simulation settings

    • OrderDepartment

      public OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig config, int orderQueueCapacity, int storageCapacity)
      Creates an order department with explicit queue capacities.
      Parameters:
      config - simulation settings
      orderQueueCapacity - maximum number of accepted orders waiting for bakers
      storageCapacity - maximum number of finished orders in storage

    • OrderDepartment

      public OrderDepartment(int orderQueueCapacity, int storageCapacity)
      Creates an order department for tests or standalone worker execution.
      Parameters:
      orderQueueCapacity - maximum number of accepted orders waiting for bakers
      storageCapacity - maximum number of finished orders in storage

  • Method Details

    • acceptOrdersDuringWorkingHours

      public void acceptOrdersDuringWorkingHours() throws InterruptedException
      Accepts configured orders during working hours and closes the incoming queue afterwards.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread is interrupted while waiting

    • submitOrder

      public boolean submitOrder(Order order) throws InterruptedException
      Adds a new incoming order and prints its accepted status.
      Parameters:
      order - accepted order
      Returns:
      true if the order was queued, false if the queue was closed
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread is interrupted while waiting

    • closeOrders

      public void closeOrders()
      Closes the incoming order queue.

    • takeOrderForCooking

      public Order takeOrderForCooking() throws InterruptedException
      Returns the next order for a baker and prints its cooking status.
      Returns:
      the next order, or null if the queue is closed and empty
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread is interrupted while waiting

    • placeCookedOrderInStorage

      public boolean placeCookedOrderInStorage(Order order) throws InterruptedException
      Stores a finished order and prints storage-related statuses.
      Parameters:
      order - cooked order
      Returns:
      true if the order was stored, false if storage was closed
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread is interrupted while waiting

    • takeOrdersForDelivery

      public List<Order> takeOrdersForDelivery(int bagCapacity) throws InterruptedException
      Returns orders for a courier trip and prints loading statuses.
      Parameters:
      bagCapacity - maximum number of orders in one courier trip
      Returns:
      loaded orders, or an empty list if storage is closed and empty
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread is interrupted while waiting

    • completeDelivery

      public void completeDelivery(List<Order> orders)
      Prints delivered statuses for the completed courier trip.
      Parameters:
      orders - delivered orders

    • closeStorage

      public void closeStorage()
      Closes finished-order storage.
